tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
Giving up your free time to help others is one of the most 1.1. _________ things a young person can do. Acts of 1.2. _________, however small, can brighten someone's whole day. Many people are surprised to discover what a real 1.3. _________ a single volunteer can make.

Volunteering also teaches important lessons. Looking after others gives you a sense of 1.4. _________ that is hard to find anywhere else. Working side by side with strangers often leads to lasting 1.5. _________ as well. Most towns have at least one 1.6. _________ that welcomes willing helpers, whether at an animal shelter, a library or a care home.

Best of all, the work itself is genuinely 1.7. _________. When you look back at the end of the day and see what you have achieved, it is impossible not to feel 1.8. _________ of yourself.
